value.rationale: The page is entirely about Antigravity 2.0's agent permission system (deny/ask/allow lists, supported actions like read_file, write_file, read_url, execute_url, command, mcp, etc.). There is no mention anywhere of a "remote control" feature that allows steering or approving agent runs from a phone or remote client. The interactive permission prompts described are editor-based (in-editor cards), not mobile/remote client interfaces.
